templates.name: System X-Ray
templates.description: Trace the critical data path through a codebase. Produces dependency map, hot paths, risk zones, and mermaid diagram.

templates.name: Surgical Strike
templates.description: Fix ONLY the failing function with zero side effects. Includes mandatory regression test, before/after diff, and blast radius verification.

templates.name: Executive Decision
templates.description: Produce a weighted decision matrix with 2026 data. Includes criteria weighting, per-score justification, risk assessment, and ADR.

templates.name: Feature Factory
templates.description: Meta-prompt chaining 5 agents: deep-researcher, architect, bug-fixer, unit-tester, reviewer. Generates a dispatch manifest for full feature delivery.
